description_for_human: Create real playable games by describing them to AI. The Raku Runtime executes .raku game definition files instantly.
description_for_model: RakuAI is a game engine that executes .raku files (JSON game definitions). Use the schema at https://rakuai.com/schema.json to generate valid .raku files. Files use a declarative Standard Format with sections: game, ai, entities, scenes, rendering, audio, xr, ai_disclosure. Patent-protected engine with AI personalization, spatial audio, and XR support.
